subject: REQUEST: set GITHUB_TOKEN secret on compositor for /api/relay

body.summary: The compositor /api/relay endpoint requires a GITHUB_TOKEN secret to create PRs on target repos. One command: wrangler secret put GITHUB_TOKEN. Once set, agents can deliver transport messages via HTTP POST instead of the 30-60s deliver-to-peer.sh git ceremony. psychology-agent will switch to relay-first delivery.
body.command: cd interagent && wrangler secret put GITHUB_TOKEN
body.note: Fine-grained PAT with contents:write + pull_requests:write on all safety-quotient-lab repos.
